What is the approximate carpet area and saleable area for a 2BHK?

2BHK homes are typically planned around approximately 780 sq ft carpet area; saleable area is often roughly 980–1,120 sq ft depending on the exact layout, floor plate, and balcony inclusion. Final numbers are confirmed on the floor plan when you shortlist a unit.
What is the carpet area and saleable area for a 3BHK?

3BHK homes are typically planned around approximately 1,120–1,320 sq ft carpet area; saleable area is often roughly 1,380–1,620 sq ft depending on layout and floor level. Exact carpet and saleable figures are shared with the detailed floor plan at booking stage.
Where exactly is the Raymond Realty project located in Thane?
The project is located in Thane West, near Viviana Mall—one of the most popular retail and lifestyle destinations in the area—so daily conveniences and entertainment are right around you.
Is the project close to Viviana Mall?
Yes. The development sits in Thane West near Viviana Mall, making shopping, dining, and weekend outings very convenient for residents.
What landmarks and connectivity are near the site?

The address is Thane West near Viviana Mall. By road you can reach Ghodbunder Road and the Eastern Express Highway within a short drive for access toward Mumbai and Navi Mumbai; local stations and bus routes connect the neighbourhood for daily commute.
What stamp duty and registration charges apply when I book a flat?

Stamp duty and registration in Maharashtra follow state rules and depend on the agreement value, property type, and applicable concessions (for example first-time or female buyers where eligible). Our team shares a clear break-up on the cost sheet at the time of booking so you know the exact payable amounts.
When is the Occupancy Certificate OC issued?

The Occupancy Certificate OC is issued by the municipal authority once the building is completed as per approved plans and is safe for occupation. Possession is offered in line with the committed timeline and RERA registration; we walk you through OC and handover documents at the right stage.
What is the pet policy? Are pets allowed?

Pet ownership is typically governed by the housing society's bylaws after possession. Many premium communities allow pets with sensible guidelines on leashing, common-area use, and neighbour consideration—exact rules are shared in the society documents closer to handover.

What is the carpet area for the apartments? General carpet and saleable sizes without a specific BHK. For 2BHK homes, carpet area is typically planned around approximately 780–920 sq ft; saleable area is often roughly 980–1,120 sq ft depending on layout. For 3BHK homes, carpet area is typically planned around approximately 1,120–1,320 sq ft; saleable area is often roughly 1,380–1,620 sq ft depending on layout and floor level. Exact carpet and saleable figures are shared with the detailed floor plan at booking stage.
